---
# title: "blog"
listing:
  contents: [posts, posts.yml]
  sort: "date desc"
  # type: default
  fields: [date, title, image, description, categories]
  feed: true
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  date-format: YYYY-MM-DD
comments: false
description: Recent posts of Muhammad Abdullahi
pagetitle: Muhammad Abdullahi
# page-layout: full
# title-block-banner: true
---

<h1 style="margin-botom: 2rem !important">

I am Muhammad

</h1>

I am a software engineer interested in AI.

This is where I try to share lessons learned during my journey in learning AI / Deep learning.
